falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if β1 (mass privatisation) is positive and significant at p<0.10 for TFP growth and larger than the EU-candidacy coefficient. PARTIAL if positive and significant but smaller than EU candidacy (institutional anchor dominates ownership reform). REFUTED if β1 is negative and significant at p<0.10. INFORMATIVE: excluding Russia should not eliminate the positive sign; if it does, the result is driven by one dominant case.
